name: Tahm Kench/Patch history - League of Legends Wiki
snippet: This page documents all known changes for Tahm Kench in League of Legends since the champion's initial release in V5.13.

name: Tahm Kench Abilities & Skill Order - LoL Patch 26.7
snippet: Master Tahm Kench's abilities in Patch 26.7. Detailed Passive, Q, W, E, R breakdowns with video previews, combos, and skill order. Learn ability mechanics to win more games.

name: Riot unveils first details around the long-waited Tahm Kench
snippet: Starting with the main one, both Tahm Kench’s Devour (W) and Abyssal Voyage (R) will be swapped, similar to Diana’s case with her E and R back in 2019. This exchange also provides certain balance adjustments to both abilities.
